source_document: Tariff Book TRANSNET NATIONAL PORTS AUTHORITY April 2024 to March 2025 Twenty Third Edition

rules.name: Light Dues
rules.notes: Charged at the first South African port of call, valid for 60 days within SA waters. Rate for 'All other vessels' applies to Richards Bay.

rules.name: Port Dues
rules.notes: Charged per 100 GT or part thereof, plus an additional rate per 100 GT or part thereof per 24-hour period. Richards Bay uses the general rate as it's not listed separately.

rules.name: Towage Dues
rules.notes: Rates for Richards Bay based on vessel tonnage bands. Charged per service (entering and leaving).

rules.name: VTS Dues
rules.notes: Charged per GT per port call, with a minimum fee. Richards Bay uses the general 'all ports excluding Durban and Saldanha Bay' rate.

rules.name: Pilotage Dues
rules.notes: Charged as a basic fee per service plus a rate per 100 GT or part thereof. Richards Bay specific rates used. Charged for both entering and leaving.

rules.name: Running of Vessel Lines
rules.notes: Charged as a basic fee per service plus a rate per 100 GT or part thereof. Richards Bay specific rates used. Charged for both berthing and unberthing as per the Berthing Services tariff.
